channel.title: Salt and Sanctuary on Chasing Dings!
channel.description: Recent content in Salt and Sanctuary on Chasing Dings!

item.title: Salt & Sanctuary: When Watching Elden Ring Isn't Enough
item.description: My partner is playing our copy of Elden Ring, and I’d love to do more than just watch. Doesn’t make much sense to buy another copy when I can just use his when he’s done, but I wanted to play a Souls-like and I didn’t much like Bloodborne (which I had for free). Enter Salt & Sanctuary, a 2D souls-like for those who think a third dimension is just showing off.
